case_title: KIMBERLY HILLMAN VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF COORDINATION OF ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILLMAN, KIMBERLY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2011 PREVIOUSLY TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE MATTER IS COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4631.
